title: Grilled Semolina Cakes with Molten Chocolate Sauce
description: A decadent dessert featuring crispy semolina cakes paired with a rich and gooey molten chocolate sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together semolina, coconut milk, eggs, and sugar.
Heat a non-stick skillet or grill pan over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the semolina mixture into the skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the cakes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the semolina cakes with molten chocolate sauce and tempting toppings (if using).
To make the molten chocolate sauce, melt 1 cup of chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval until smooth.
Stir in 1 tablespoon of heavy cream to thin the sauce.
Bring the sauce to a simmer over low heat and cook for 2-3 minutes or until heated through.
